description: We are hiring a mid-level Frontend Engineer (3-5 years of experience) to build our customer-facing web application. This role is onsite in our New York, NY office — it is not a remote position.

lists.content:
• 3-5 years building production web apps with React and TypeScript
  • Strong CSS and accessibility (WCAG) fundamentals
  • Experience with Next.js and modern build tooling
  • Must be able to work onsite in New York, NY
